sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# New phase with 14 green blocks
# Yellow dots indicate which blocks to click first
# Green blocks under yellow dots: 10 blocks
# Green blocks NOT under yellow dots: 4 blocks (cols 31-35)

# Click on green blocks under yellow dots first
clicks = [
    (33, 15), (33, 39), (33, 45), (33, 51),  # rows 31-35
    (39, 15), (39, 21), (39, 27),  # rows 37-41 (not 31-35)
    (45, 15), (45, 21), (45, 27)   # rows 43-47 (not 31-35)
]

for r, c in clicks:
    result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': r, 'col': c}])
    green_count = sum(1 for n in current_frame.segmentation['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N')
    print(f"Click ({r},{c}): green={green_count}, gameplay_changed={last_action_result.get('gameplay_changed')}")
    if last_action_result.get('game_over') or last_action_result.get('level_completed'):
        break

print(f"\nAfter first batch: level_completed={last_action_result.get('level_completed')}, game_over={last_action_result.get('game_over')}")

# Now click on remaining 4 blocks (cols 31-35)
if not last_action_result.get('game_over') and not last_action_result.get('level_completed'):
    remaining_clicks = [
        (3, 33), (9, 33),  # top 2
        (39, 33), (45, 33)  # bottom 2
    ]
    for r, c in remaining_clicks:
        result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': r, 'col': c}])
        green_count = sum(1 for n in current_frame.segmentation['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N')
        print(f"Click ({r},{c}): green={green_count}, gameplay_changed={last_action_result.get('gameplay_changed')}")
        if last_action_result.get('game_over') or last_action_result.get('level_completed'):
            break
    
    print(f"\nFinal: level_completed={last_action_result.get('level_completed')}, game_over={last_action_result.get('game_over')}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
